lane_0_pressure.reason: 405 confirmed; identify correct transport mode for Tavily MCP

lane_2_current_tavily_config_state.problem: type=sse with direct URL causes 405 from langchain_mcp_adapters POST vs GET mismatch

transport_options_found.description: Local npx installation, spawns subprocess via stdin/stdout
Use mcp-remote proxy to connect to Tavily SSE endpoint
transport_options_found.status: alternative but embeds key in URL (not preferred)

transport_options_found.description: Direct SSE connection via langchain_mcp_adapters SSE client
transport_options_found.status: BROKEN - 405 Method Not Allowed on POST from langchain SSE client

lane_4_405_root_cause_confirmed.culprit: langchain_mcp_adapters SSE client (mcp/client/sse.py) uses POST for SSE handshake
lane_4_405_root_cause_confirmed.tavily_endpoint_behavior: https://mcp.tavily.com/mcp requires GET for SSE stream initialization, rejects POST with 405
lane_4_405_root_cause_confirmed.mcp_sse_spec_compliance: MCP spec allows POST for initial handshake but Tavily endpoint only accepts GET
lane_4_405_root_cause_confirmed.mcp_remote_solution: mcp-remote uses its own HTTP client that likely sends GET, bypassing langchain SSE client
lane_4_405_root_cause_confirmed.root_cause_classification: Transport protocol mismatch between langchain SSE client and Tavily SSE endpoint
lane_4_405_root_cause_confirmed.fix_required: Switch from type=sse (direct URL) to type=stdio with npx tavily-mcp local installation

lane_5_stdio_transport_validation.note: tavily-mcp is a local stdio MCP server, NOT a remote SSE endpoint proxy

lane_6_mcp_remote_alternative_examined.security_concern: API key embedded in URL query parameter (exposed in process list, logs)
lane_6_mcp_remote_alternative_examined.reason: key in URL is a security risk; env var auth is preferred

lane_7_fix_recommendation.smoke_test_plan: After patch: reset cache, load tools, invoke tavily-search with test query

lane_8_next_phase_decision.rationale: Root cause identified: type=sse with direct URL causes POST/Get mismatch. Fix: switch to type=stdio with npx tavily-mcp local installation. R147K should apply the config patch and run Tavily smoke test.

lane_9_unknown_registry_updates.description: tavily-mcp@0.2.19 is a local stdio MCP server; correct transport is type=stdio with npx command, NOT type=sse with direct URL
lane_9_unknown_registry_updates.fix_applied: R147J: identified stdio as correct transport

lane_9_unknown_registry_updates.description: langchain_mcp_adapters SSE client sends POST but Tavily SSE endpoint requires GET; 405 is transport mismatch, not credential issue
lane_9_unknown_registry_updates.fix_applied: R147J: 405 root cause confirmed; stdio transport avoids this

lane_9_unknown_registry_updates.description: mcp-remote alternative embeds TAVILY_API_KEY in URL query parameter; security risk; env var auth via stdio is preferred
lane_9_unknown_registry_updates.fix_applied: R147J: mcp-remote rejected due to URL-embedded key; stdio preferred

r147k_authorization_package.title: TAVILY_STDIO_FIX
r147k_authorization_package.goal: Apply stdio transport fix to extensions_config.json and smoke test Tavily MCP

tavily.description: Tavily search (enabled R147I; stdio transport fix R147K; key via env)
